title: [FIRRTL] Add Names to Side Effecting Statements, Make them Annotatable
body:
Upstream FIRRTL added names to stop, printf, and verification statements (assert, assume, cover) in https://github.com/chipsalliance/firrtl/pull/2057.  

Support for annotating FIRRTL IR verification statements is being added to the Chisel in 3.5.0 (this is unreleased) in https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel3/pull/1968.

Update the ODS representation of FIRRTL dialect to hold this name (which should be optional?). Update the annotation parsing logic to attach annotations to these side effecting statements.
